description: Good news!!!!! Zahra 🤍🐾 My foster got adopted today! I couldn’t be happier for her and her new family. She truly is such an amazing dog, and I know she’s going to bring so much love, joy, and companionship into their lives. Wishing her the very best in this next chapter — may they enjoy her sweet spirit for many, many years to come. I’ll miss her, but my heart is so full knowing she found her forever home
